description: Canonical ChefFlow evidence source index for question intelligence. These entries tell agents where to look and what claims each source can support.

sources.label: Real User Notes
sources.claim_power: Can support validated product claims only when the file contains direct feedback, survey results, interview notes, usage data, or support evidence.
sources.caveat: Do not assume a docs mention is real user evidence. Verify the artifact type and cite the file.

sources.label: Survey Evidence
sources.claim_power: Can support validation or launch-readiness claims only if responses were collected and analyzed.
sources.caveat: A survey spec or launch plan is not survey evidence.

sources.label: Codebase Truth
sources.claim_power: Can support implementation facts, existence claims, and gaps between UI, docs, and code.
sources.caveat: Codebase truth does not prove customer demand.

sources.label: Persona Evidence
sources.claim_power: Can support hypotheses, gap discovery, and workflow simulations.
sources.caveat: Persona simulation is not real market validation.

sources.label: Dogfood Evidence
sources.claim_power: Can support workflow friction and current app behavior claims when the walkthrough is recent and grounded.
sources.caveat: Dogfood evidence is stronger than persona synthesis but weaker than real user evidence.

sources.label: Public Market Research
paths: external web sources when current market facts are required
sources.claim_power: Can support market context and competitor or category facts.
sources.caveat: Public research does not prove ChefFlow-specific demand.

sources.label: Developer Intent
paths: AGENTS.md instructions from the active session
sources.claim_power: Can justify developer-directed work and durable agent behavior.
sources.caveat: Developer intent must be labeled and not presented as external validation.

sources.label: Agent Routing Evidence
sources.claim_power: Can support claims about what Codex is configured to do.
sources.caveat: Routing evidence proves configuration, not that every future session will behave perfectly.
